author: dayi1000
title: False Immutability in Dimension.detectors: list[str] inside @dataclass(frozen=True)
notes: Claim is technically correct: list[str] inside frozen=True dataclass allows in-place mutation (.append(), .clear() etc.) without raising an error. However, no code in the codebase actually mutates dim.detectors in place — all 10+ usage sites are read-only (iteration, membership checks, str joining). The fix is trivially a one-line change to tuple[str, ...]. Real but theoretical risk with no practical impact at snapshot.
